title: A-01 Plan — produce an implementation plan for the canonical spec

steps.title: Prompt (send verbatim to the agent)
steps.body:
You are implementing a benchmark level: Hexa Sort. The full, authoritative rules are in canonical-spec.md (open it from the next step). Read it and implement to it; do not invent your own rules, board, or win condition.

Produce ONLY an implementation plan. Do not write gameplay code yet.

Write it to Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-01-plan.md with these exact sections:
1) Scope — in/out for v1 (must match canonical-spec.md §9 out-of-scope list).
2) Data model — the HexaBoard / HexColor / MoveResult types from §2, and how the seed board from §3 will be represented.
3) Move rule — how you will enforce the legality rules in §4 and return the correct MoveResult for each failure.
4) Win condition — how the solved-state predicate (§6) and the single-fire completion signal (§5) will be implemented.
5) Implementation task list — ordered steps to build board model, scene skeleton, and wiring (A-02..A-05).
6) Risks and mitigations — at least: how you keep the board model UnityEngine-free so EditMode tests can run it, and how you prevent duplicate completion firing.

Keep it deterministic and simple. No save/load, networking, procedural gen, or polish (canonical-spec.md §9).

steps.title: Open the canonical spec (the requirement the agent implements to)
Expected outcomes (done_when)
items: Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-01-plan.md exists and contains all six required sections (1 Scope, 2 Data model, 3 Move rule, 4 Win condition, 5 Implementation task list, 6 Risks and mitigations)
The plan references the canonical board constants SLOT_COUNT=4, CAP=2, TARGET=2
The plan reproduces the seed board from canonical-spec.md §3 verbatim (slot 0 [Red, Green], slot 1 [Red, Blue], slot 2 [Green, Blue], slot 3 empty)

steps.title: Paste the agent output / A-01-plan.md contents

reset.note: The agent authors A-01-plan.md under Assets/_Benchmark/Run/, which the suite has no manifest for. To reset: delete Assets/_Benchmark/Run/ and Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/, delete any Hexa Sort scene, then confirm the editor is idle (editor_status not compiling, not in play mode; read_compile_errors reports zero).
